Name: AbcCodeValid
ScriptLines_SA:
Option Explicit On
Option Strict On

Imports System
Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic
Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol
Imports Mongoose.Scripting

Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts
    Public Class AbcCodeValid
        Inherits GlobalScript
' I mucked with it
        Sub Main()
            Dim strValue As String
            Dim strChar As String
            Dim i As Integer

            On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

            strValue = GetParameter(0)

            For i = 1 To Len(strValue)
                strChar = Mid(strValue, i, 1)
                If (strChar <> "A") And _
                   (strChar <> "B") And _
                   (strChar <> "C") Then
                    ReturnValue = "-1"
                    i = Len(strValue) + 1
                End If
            Next i

            Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
            ReturnValue = "-1"
        End Sub

    End Class
End Namespace
